calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-31-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert , CSR: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Petitioner: Addie Jordan Burnette, present in pro per, also was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: JORDAN BURNETTE BOLIO.
Decree signed in open court.

Petitioners Addie Jordan Burnette and Roel Jamin Bolio Estrella, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for /and with/ the Minor: OLIVIA BLOO ESTRELLA BURNETTE, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of a Minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: OLIVIA VALENTINA BOLIO.
Decree signed in open court.
